insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a strong study habit. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a steady momentum, and with each passing day, you'll be one step closer to unlocking your full potential and improving your scores.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
